requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 18487 Baseline vs Indonesian Project Basis
requirement_topic.zh: 中国 GB/T 18487 基线对比印度尼西亚项目依据
requirement_topic.zht: 中國 GB/T 18487 基線對比印尼項目依據

summary.en: Indonesian acceptance should be based on the current Indonesian project documents, SNI catalogue status, ESDM rules, PLN requirements, and any owner or tender specifications. Those documents determine whether IEC 61851, IEC 62196, local electrical installation rules, communications, metering, or utility interfaces are mandatory for a specific site.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚接受性应以现行印度尼西亚项目文件、SNI 目录状态、ESDM 规则、PLN 要求以及任何业主或招标规格为基础。这些文件决定 IEC 61851、IEC 62196、当地电气安装规则、通信、计量或电网接口是否对具体场站具有强制性。
summary.zht: 印尼接受性應以現行印尼項目文件、SNI 目錄狀態、ESDM 規則、PLN 要求以及任何業主或招標規格為基礎。這些文件決定 IEC 61851、IEC 62196、當地電氣安裝規則、通信、計量或電網介面是否對具體場站具有強制性。

standards_or_laws: Applicable Indonesian SNI / ESDM / PLN / tender requirements

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1 is the common Chinese baseline for conductive EV charging systems and is paired with connector standards in the GB/T 20234 series and communication requirements such as GB/T 27930 for DC charging. It is a China-market baseline, not an Indonesian approval route.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1 是中国传导式电动汽车充电系统的常见基线，并与 GB/T 20234 系列连接装置标准及 GB/T 27930 等直流充电通信要求配套使用。它是中国市场基线，而非印度尼西亚批准路径。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1 是中國傳導式電動汽車充電系統的常見基線，並與 GB/T 20234 系列連接裝置標準及 GB/T 27930 等直流充電通信要求配套使用。它是中國市場基線，而非印尼批准路徑。

gap.en: The exporter should build a crosswalk from GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 reports to the Indonesian project basis, identifying gaps in voltage and frequency assumptions, connector hardware, protective functions, communication protocol, metering, labels, manuals, utility interface, and local operation obligations. Any claim of equivalence should be limited to mapped clauses supported by test evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应建立从 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 报告到印度尼西亚项目依据的对照表，识别电压和频率假设、连接器硬件、保护功能、通信协议、计量、标签、手册、电网接口和当地运营义务方面的差距。任何等同性声明都应仅限于有测试证据支持的已映射条款。
gap.zht: 出口商應建立從 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 報告到印尼項目依據的對照表，識別電壓和頻率假設、連接器硬體、保護功能、通信協議、計量、標籤、手冊、電網介面和當地營運義務方面的差距。任何等同性聲明都應僅限於有測試證據支持的已映射條款。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only to the extent Indonesian SNI, ESDM, PLN, tender, installation, or owner documents require the mapped item
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 and related GB/T standards are the China-market technical baseline for domestic EVSE conformity

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / Standardization Administration of China National Public Service Platform for Standards Information

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487 evidence can support an Indonesian submission only after clause-by-clause mapping. It should not be presented as a substitute for SNI, ESDM, PLN, or project-specific requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487 证据只有在逐条映射后才可支持印度尼西亚提交文件，不应被表述为替代 SNI、ESDM、PLN 或项目特定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487 證據只有在逐條映射後才可支持印尼提交文件，不應被表述為替代 SNI、ESDM、PLN 或項目特定要求。
